name: Kettlebell Halo to Reverse Lunge
description: Perform a kettlebell halo (circling the bell around your head), then immediately step back into a reverse lunge. Return to standing and repeat the halo in the opposite direction before lunging on the other leg. The halo keeps the shoulders and core engaged while the lunge hits quads, glutes, and balance. Smooth and controlled — don't rush the halo.

media.caption: KB halo to reverse lunge + figure 8 to reverse lunge combo
